meta.description: TSE-compliant POS system, online pre-ordering, and QR table ordering for cafés and bakeries. From €69/month. Get your free consultation now.

hero.subtitle: TSE-compliant POS, online pre-ordering, and QR table ordering — easy to set up, ready to go.
hero.geoText: Since January 1, 2020, all POS systems in Germany must be equipped with a certified technical security device (TSE). The tax office can check compliance at any time — violations can result in fines of up to €25,000. Cafés and bakeries that also use online pre-ordering systems reduce wait times and demonstrably increase average order value.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions from café and bakery owners
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most often.

items.q: Does my café need a TSE-compliant cash register?
items.a: Yes. Since 2020, every cash register in Germany is legally required to have TSE certification. The tax office can check this at any time. Violations can result in fines of up to €25,000. The [Gastro Master POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) meets all requirements — we take care of that for you.

items.q: Can I accept online pre-orders through Gastro Master?
items.a: Yes. Your customers can order and pay in advance through your [online shop](/produkte/webshop) or your [app](/produkte/app). Ideal for lunch breaks or weekend breakfast. You see all orders directly on your POS.

items.q: How much does a POS system for a bakery cost at Gastro Master?
items.a: The [POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) starts at €69 per month. Included: TSE module, menu management, daily closing, and personal support. Setup is individually tailored to your business.

items.q: Does the POS work without internet?
items.a: Yes. The Gastro Master [POS](/produkte/kassensystem) also works offline. All data is stored locally and automatically synced once the connection is restored.

items.q: Can I manage multiple locations through one system?
items.a: Yes. You manage all locations through a central dashboard. Menu, statistics, and settings — all in one place. Ideal if you have or plan multiple locations. For franchise systems, there's the [franchise solution](/loesungen/franchise).
